rationale: Educ. Code §31.028 governs special instructional materials for blind and visually impaired students. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The commissioner may purchase special instructional materials for the education of blind and visually impaired students in public schools.
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns instructional materials for visually impaired students and is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
